"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\sqllogictest.dir/objects.a
D:\CLION2~1.2\bin\mingw\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\sqllogictest.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\sqllogictest.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\CLION2~1.2\bin\mingw\bin\G__~1.EXE -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\sqllogictest.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o ..\..\bin\bustub-sqllogictest.exe -Wl,--out-implib,..\..\lib\libbustub-sqllogictest.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\sqllogictest.dir\linkLibs.rsp
